2605.30790.title: On the impact of retrieved content representations in RAG Pipelines
2605.30790.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) supplements a language model's input with retrieved documents, yet most RAG pipelines inherit retrieval components designed for human readers. How retrieved content should be represented when the consumer is a large language model (LLM) rather than a human is less well understood. Recent work has proposed transformations of retrieved content and identified properties that affect generation, but each examines a single transformation or property in isolation, leaving open which features of a document's representation matter most. We address this with a controlled comparison: holding retrieval fixed, we vary only the representation of retrieved documents, comparing an original baseline against thirteen transformations spanning selection, summarisation, and reformulation, in query-dependent and query-independent variants. Across these fourteen representations we measure question-answering accuracy for four generators, and for each representation we also measure answer retention: whether a known answer-bearing document still supports its answer after transformation. We find that answer retention is the primary determinant of generator accuracy; notably, when retention is high, a representation's wording, structure, length, and query-dependence have limited effect. This suggests that accuracy gains attributed to specific mechanisms in prior work may be partly explained by how well those mechanisms preserve answer-bearing content, an attribution that cannot be settled without controlling for retention.
2605.30790.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）通過檢索的文檔來補充語言模型的輸入，但大多數 RAG 管道繼承了為人類讀者設計的檢索組件。當消費者是一個大型語言模型（LLM）而非人類時，檢索內容應如何表示則不太清楚。最近的研究提出了檢索內容的轉換，並識別了影響生成的屬性，但每個研究都孤立地檢查了單一的轉換或屬性，未能確定文檔表示的哪些特徵最為重要。我們通過控制比較來解決這個問題：固定檢索，我們僅改變檢索文檔的表示，將原始基準與涵蓋選擇、摘要和重述的十三種轉換進行比較，包括查詢依賴和查詢獨立的變體。在這十四種表示中，我們測量了四個生成器的問答準確性，並且對於每種表示，我們還測量了答案保留：即在轉換後，已知的答案承載文檔是否仍然支持其答案。我們發現答案保留是生成器準確性的主要決定因素；值得注意的是，當保留率高時，表示的措辭、結構、長度和查詢依賴性對準確性的影響有限。這表明，先前工作中歸因於特定機制的準確性增益可能部分是由於這些機制在保留答案承載內容方面的有效性，這一歸因無法在不控制保留的情況下確定。
2605.30790.author: Jonathan J Ross et.al.
2605.30790.authors: Jonathan J Ross, Bevan Koopman, Anton van der Vegt, Guido Zuccon
